timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2032-04 to 2032-04-30 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

stakeholder_issues.detail: Junction Rivers lost its South-West REZ grid access right. Material risk for CISA execution within the federal scheme's 14-month execution window — without REZ access the project may not reach FID. EIS lodged with NSW DPHI; Response to Submissions phase.
Project is in pre-approval phase — EIS lodged, RTS phase. Planning approval is gating factor for CISA execution.

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 1 underwriting awarded (585 MW wind + 800 MWh BESS)
timeline_events.detail: Junction Rivers wind + BESS hybrid wins CIS Tender 1 underwriting — 585 MW wind paired with ~800 MWh storage. Developed by Windlab (Squadron / Forrest). One of 7 NSW T1 winners.

timeline_events.title: Lost SW REZ access rights
timeline_events.detail: Junction Rivers lost its South-West REZ grid access right — a material headwind for CISA execution and FID. Project is also still in planning Response to Submissions phase, not yet approved.
